zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Bermingham於1262年出生在愛爾蘭時，他的父親William I Bermingham28歲，母親Isabel Astley26歲。他於大約1287年與Matilda Deincourt在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1332年7月11日在愛爾蘭庫迪 度布林度布林 卡素享年70歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 度布林度布林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Bermingham于1262年出生在爱尔兰时，他的父亲William I Bermingham28岁，母亲Isabel Astley26岁。他于大约1287年与Matilda Deincourt在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1332年7月11日在爱尔兰庫迪 度布林度布林 卡素享年70岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 度布林度布林。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bermingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Liam, Sinead.
Irish (of English origin): variant of   Birmingham  . This form of the surname is found mainly in Ireland.

History: The Bermingham family take their surname from lands held at what is now a great city in the West Midlands of England, but it was brought to Ireland as early as the 12th century. The Norman baron Robert de Bermyngeham was a follower of Strongbow (see Clare ); his name is found on a number of Irish charters between 1175 and 1179. The family was also known as Mac Fheorais (see Corish ) in Ireland, named for Piers (Gaelic Feoras) de Bermyngeham, the father of Robert.

variants.name: Birmingham
meanings: English: habitational name from Birmingham in the West Midlands. In Domesday Book the name is already found as Bermingeham, but it seems likely that it was originally Beornmundingahām ‘homestead (Old English hām) of the people of (-inga-) Beornmund’, a personal name composed of the elements beorn ‘young man, warrior’ + mund ‘protection’. This surname is established in Ireland (see Bermingham ).

variants.name: Corish
meanings: shortened form of Mac Fheorais ‘son of Piers’. The name was borne by a Connacht family descended from Piers de Bermingham, second lord of Athenry in Galway (died c. 1309). Compare Bermingham .
shortened form of Mac Muirghis ‘son of Maurice’, a personal name introduced to Ireland by the Normans. Compare Morrissey .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Bermingham was born in 1262, in Ireland, his father, William I Bermingham, was 28 and his mother, Isabel Astley, was 26. He married Matilda Deincourt about 1287, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 11 July 1332, in Dublin Castle, County Dublin, Ireland, at the age of 70, and was buried in Dublin, County Dublin, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Bermingham est né en 1262, à Irlande, son père, William I Bermingham, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Isabel Astley, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Matilda Deincourt environ 1287, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 11 juillet 1332, à Dublin Castle, County Dublin, Irlande, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Dublin, County Dublin, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Bermingham 1262 in Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William I Bermingham 28 und seine Mutter Isabel Astley 26. Er hat um 1287 in England, United Kingdom Matilda Deincourt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Juli 1332 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Dublin Castle, County Dublin, Irland und wurde in Dublin, County Dublin, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Bermingham è nato il nel 1262 nel Irlanda, il suo padre, William I Bermingham, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Astley, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Matilda Deincourt circa 1287, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 11 luglio 1332, nel Dublin Castle, County Dublin, Irlanda, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Berminghamが1262年にアイルランドで生まれた時，父William I Berminghamは28歳，母Isabel Astleyは26歳であった。約1287年にイギリスイギリスでMatilda Deincourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1332年7月11日にアイルランドコウントイ ダブリンダブリン カストルで70歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ ダブリンダブリンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Bermingham(이)가 1262년 아일랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William I Bermingham(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Astley(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1287년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Matilda Deincourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1332년 7월 11일 아일랜드 카운티 드블린 드블린 카스틀에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 드블린 드블린에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Bermingham nasceu em 1262, em Irlanda, seu pai, William I Bermingham, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Astley, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda Deincourt aproximadamente 1287, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de julho de 1332, em Dublin Castle, County Dublin, Irlanda, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Bermingham родился в 1262 г. в местности Ирландия, его отцу по имени William I Bermingham было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Astley, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Deincourt около 1287 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 11 июля 1332 г. в местности дублинь кастл, коунти дублинь, Ирландия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности дублинь, коунти дублинь, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Bermingham nació en 1262, en Irlanda, su papá, William I Bermingham, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Isabel Astley, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Matilda Deincourt aproximadamente 1287, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 11 de julio de 1332, en Dublin Castle, County Dublin, Irlanda, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda.
